markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between CodeRabbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and execution plan.](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CodeRabbit wants to focus on high-volume keywords (\>1000 searches) related to AI coding tools, not just AI code reviews](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2370.0)
  - [GrowthX will update writing guidelines and content strategy based on CodeRabbit's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [CodeRabbit will provide more specific guidance on preferred programming languages and topics to prioritize](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
  - [Publishing workflow and image creation process need further discussion and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [CodeRabbit's CEO wants to target higher volume keywords beyond just AI code reviews](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2370.0)
  - [Focus on keywords with \>1000 monthly searches, with some exceptions for strategic languages/topics](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)
  - [GrowthX to adjust content ideas to align with this broader strategy](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)
  - [CodeRabbit to provide list of priority programming languages and topics](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)

### Writing Guidelines and Content Quality

  - [CodeRabbit flagged concerns about formulaic article starts and technical inaccuracies](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [GrowthX to update guidelines, focusing more on how to discuss adjacent tools/topics](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Need for high technical accuracy and examples in content](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement additional technical review steps in content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [CodeRabbit uses Hashnode as a headless CMS into Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [GrowthX can stage content, but final publishing will be done by CodeRabbit](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Two-step review process: editorial (Amanda) and technical (assigned per topic)](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Discussion needed on handling in-line images and meta images](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [GrowthX to set up Looker and Scrunch dashboards for performance reporting](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [CodeRabbit to provide access to Google Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Scrunch to be used for tracking AI visibility using audience-specific prompts](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)

## Next Steps

  - [CodeRabbit to review and provide feedback on proposed content topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [CodeRabbit to share list of priority programming languages and topics](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
  - [GrowthX to update writing guidelines based on CodeRabbit's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [GrowthX to adjust content strategy to focus on higher volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)
  - [Discuss and finalize image creation and publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [Set up performance tracking dashboards (Looker and Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/pCNxVkQweoS-g2LrF1R9mCnTzxKEqs9W?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
